title: Pierogi Ruskie
instructions: Make dough with flour, egg, sour cream.
Mix with cheese and caramelized onion.
Serve with butter and sour cream.

reviews.text: Just like grandma's! Added a pinch of salt and a dash of pepper. Also added a splash of sour cream and topped with fried onions.
Added bacon and cheddar cheese. Also added a pinch of garlic powder and a drizzle of melted butter.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
